label: micro perf • cancel during a cold model load: prompt termination, no zombie, clean recovery
query: List the numbers from one to two hundred as digits separated by spaces. Output only the digits.
notes: The startup-cancellation reliability row (AGENTS.md: 'if the user stops generation, closes chat, or exits during first load, startup must cancel and cleanup must prevent zombie loads and OOM growth'). Every resident model is evicted, a generation is dispatched, and the cancel fires 750 ms after dispatch — inside the multi-second cold load for a 27B-class bundle. Pass requires the stream to terminate within the cancel-latency ceiling AND a full recovery generation to succeed afterwards (no zombie load, no wedged engine). Footprint before/after-cancel/after-recovery is recorded for growth triage. reps/maxTokens shape the recovery generation. Off-CI (needs a local model).
